Id1.text: Born in Miri, Malaysia, and living in, Sarawak, Abdul Taib Mahmud, is a member of Barisan Ra'ayat Jati Sarawak party.

Id2.text: Born in Miri, in Malaysia, Abdul Taib Mahmud, resides in Sarawak and is a member of the "Barisan Ra'ayat Jati Sarawak" party.
